---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Approach

Describe the change you have in mind.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives you considered.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, examples, links, or other context here.

## Contribution Note

Please open an issue before starting non-trivial implementation work. Unsolicited
pull requests may be closed at maintainer discretion.
